title: Holoprosencephaly: A Systematic Approach
objectives: Identify key diagnostic features of Holoprosencephaly
Apply clinical reasoning to Holoprosencephaly management

sections.title: Overview of Holoprosencephaly
sections.content:
**Holoprosencephaly**

Failure of prosencephalon to cleave, spectrum (alobar to lobar), SHH gene, midline facial defects

**Key Points:**
• Failure of prosencephalon (forebrain) to divide into two hemispheres
• Spectrum: alobar (most severe, single ventricle) → semilobar → lobar (mildest)
• Midline facial defects: cyclopia, proboscis, cleft lip/palate, hypotelorism

sections.title: Pathophysiology & Key Features
sections.content:
• Failure of prosencephalon (forebrain) to divide into two hemispheres
• Spectrum: alobar (most severe, single ventricle) → semilobar → lobar (mildest)

sections.title: Diagnosis & Management
sections.content:
• Midline facial defects: cyclopia, proboscis, cleft lip/palate, hypotelorism
• 'The face predicts the brain' — facial severity correlates with brain malformation
• SHH (Sonic Hedgehog) gene mutations; also associated with trisomy 13 (Patau syndrome)

sections.title: Clinical Pearls
sections.content:
**High-Yield Points for Holoprosencephaly:**

• Midline facial defects: cyclopia, proboscis, cleft lip/palate, hypotelorism
• 'The face predicts the brain' — facial severity correlates with brain malformation
• SHH (Sonic Hedgehog) gene mutations; also associated with trisomy 13 (Patau syndrome)

mcqs.question: Which of the following is MOST characteristic of Holoprosencephaly?

options.text: Failure of prosencephalon (forebrain) to divide into two hemispheres
options.explanation: Failure of prosencephalon (forebrain) to divide into two hemispheres

options.text: Requires invasive testing in all cases

mcqs.question: What is the KEY diagnostic or management consideration for Holoprosencephaly?

options.text: SHH (Sonic Hedgehog) gene mutations; also associated with trisomy 13 (Patau syndrome)
options.explanation: SHH (Sonic Hedgehog) gene mutations; also associated with trisomy 13 (Patau syndrome)

options.text: Immediate surgical intervention in all cases
